prompt: hey, i've got a quarterly report pdf...
assertions: Agent uses the extract-text.ts script for text extraction
Agent uses JSON format flag for structured output (--format json)
Agent uses the extract-tables.ts script for table extraction
Agent specifies page range for table extraction (--pages)
Agent uses the create-pdf.ts script for PDF creation
Agent uses markdown input mode for PDF creation (--from-markdown)
Agent sets A4 page size as requested (--page-size a4 or --page-size A4)
Agent runs scripts with bun runtime (bun run)
